phase1.title: Divided Harmony
phase1.identity: Embodies opposing forces in separate forms.
phase1.mechanicConcept: Alternates between Light (offense) and Shadow (defense) each turn.

phase2.title: Perfect Convergence
phase2.mechanicConcept: Mirrors player actions — attack becomes defense, defense becomes attack.

phase2.title: Emptiness Realized
phase2.mechanicConcept: Removes all buffs, debuffs, and status effects from both sides.

phase1.title: Bearer of the Word
phase1.mechanicConcept: Imposes temporary combat rules (e.g., cannot repeat same action).

phase2.title: Living Covenant
phase2.mechanicConcept: Breaking imposed rules causes severe punishment.

phase1.title: Guiding Grace
phase1.mechanicConcept: Heals periodically and shields allies (or self).

phase2.title: The Sacrificial King
phase2.mechanicConcept: Upon defeat, resurrects once with altered abilities and increased power.

phase1.title: Still Water
phase1.mechanicConcept: Has high evasion and counter-based responses.

phase2.title: The Uncarved Path
phase2.identity: Becomes aligned with the natural flow.
phase2.mechanicConcept: Redirects player damage back partially or converts it into healing.

phase2.title: Sun Hidden in the Cave
phase2.mechanicConcept: Field darkens — random effects trigger each turn until light returns.

phase1.title: Cold Analysis
phase1.mechanicConcept: Adapts to repeated player strategies (reduced damage from repeated moves).

phase2.title: The Silent Cosmos
phase2.mechanicConcept: Disables all supernatural/status mechanics — pure rational combat.
